LONG NAME: 
ESRD_SETG_IND_1_CD 
ESRD_SETG_IND_2_CD

ESRD_SETG_IND_4_CD

TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
MedPAR (derived) 
VALUES: 
00 = IP renal dialysis-general (revenue code 0800) 
01 = IP renal dialysis-hemodialysis (revenue code 0801) 
02 = IP renal dialysis-peritoneal (non-CAPD: revenue code 0802) 
03 = IP renal dialysis-Continuous Ambulatory Peritoneal Dialysis (CAPD)
